testcase.name: Browse to a job listing and verify details
testcase.system-out: Given I open the browser to www.labcorp.com.................................passed When I click on the Careers link............................................passed And I search for the position "Lead Software QA Analyst"....................passed And I select the job listing with expected job ID- 265600 Job Title- Lead Software QA Analyst and jobLocation- United States of America.passed Then I verify the job title is "Lead Software QA Analyst"...................passed And I verify the first sentence of the JD under Responsibilities is "Senior QA resource for project teams providing solid technical leadership and support".passed And I verify the second bullet point under Minimum Qualifications is "6 or more years’ experience in Software Quality Assurance".passed And I verify the third point under Preferred Qualifications is "1 or more years' Clinical background experience.".passed When I click Apply Now......................................................passed Then I verify the job title on the apply page is "Lead Software QA Analyst".passed When I click to Return to Job Search........................................passed Then the job search page is displayed.......................................passed
